data.content: Plan review requested revisions: filtering only the ranked entries is not sufficient because buildLeaderboard also derives mean/margin and totalN from the full per-step stats today. The implementation plan should explicitly require all leaderboard-visible metrics to be computed from qualified entries only, so low-signal agents cannot still affect margin or totals after being excluded. Expand the test plan to cover a mixed-step case where an excluded low-signal agent would otherwise skew margin/totalN, and confirm the step is omitted when no qualified agents remain.
